assessment_scope: Local scientific and reproducibility evidence for the fully digital AEI submission path; independent conversion review and external release actions cannot be self-attested.

requirements.description: Fifty solver-hidden requirements cases have hash-valid, physically separated evaluator evidence.
The predeclared 400-instance regression benchmark is complete and hash-valid.
Extended representative mesh refinement fails the structural admission gate and is reported as negative qualification evidence.
The solver scaling study retains all 2,048 raw observations.
The stochastic scaling comparator uses the predeclared 30 independent seeds.
The executable-knowledge ablation reports all three preregistered representation adapters.
All 40 negative curated cases retain semantically replayed tuple-elimination ledgers.
The preregistered confirmatory assembly study retains all 7,864,320 draw-level outcomes.
The published planetary conversion remains pending independent review and cannot yet support external-validity claims.
The preregistered selector did not clear its required improvement across independent train-select-test repetitions and is reported as a negative result.
A shared aggregate binds the v3 submission evidence, source tree, platform, and both dependency locks.
Every reported table and vector figure is registered against immutable sources.
The bounded contribution is positioned against fifteen DOI-backed closest and neighboring methods under a frozen search protocol.
The revised manuscript contains the mandatory modeled-validity boundary.
requirements.pointer: valid under the declared kinematic, geometric, and digital evidence models

requirements.description: A platform-specific explicit dependency lock is committed.
A detached committed source tree passes the current AEI paper and evidence verification set in an independently created locked prefix with retained transcripts.
The editable AEI package still requires author-approved metadata, declarations, and an archival dataset identifier.
